title: heterostemon ellipticus
intro: Heterostemon ellipticus is a plant species commonly known as the "Ironwood" or "Sangre de Grado" due to its reddish sap, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant is known for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, pain, and infections. The health benefits of Heterostemon ellipticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in Latin American countries.
